90/100 Dead Simple Score
A logistics company with a life-saving payload. Turning organ transport into a scalable system when speed becomes survival.
Base DCF Case $108.00
TMDX TransMedics Group
GOLD
Why I'm Watching It
This isn't really a medical device play—it's a bet on whether organ transport can become a recurring logistics service like FedEx rather than remaining equipment sales. International expansion multiplies the addressable market beyond U.S. organ supply constraints, turning a niche medical device into a global logistics platform. The earnings volatility reflects scaling pains during rapid adoption, not fundamental demand problems.
Moat
Regulatory switching costs provide temporary protection but technology is replicable
Risks
Wild earnings volatility from +100% beats to -52% miss suggests unpredictable business model
